# Yusuf İncesu

> Software developer focused on enterprise workflow platforms, .NET/C# backends, REST integrations, clean web interfaces and database solutions. Bilingual portfolio (English & Turkish).

Yusuf İncesu is a full-stack software developer. He designs and maintains process flows on Synergy CSP and eBA / eBA Plus, builds REST integrations, and works across PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Redis and SQLite. On the product side he writes C# / .NET services and TypeScript / JavaScript frontends.

- Name: Yusuf İncesu
- Role: Software Developer
- Location: Turkey
- Education: Sakarya University — Management Information Systems (2020–2024)
- Email: yince8603@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/yusufinc
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yusuf-incesu/

## Core skills

- Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bootstrap, Tailwind, SCSS, jQuery
- Backend: C#, .NET Framework, ASP.NET, REST API
- Database: PostgreSQL, MSSQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis
- Workflow & Enterprise: Bimser Synergy (CSP), eBA / eBA Plus, Metabase, Docker

## Pages

- [Home](https://yusufincesu.netlify.app/): Overview, skills, featured projects and latest blog posts.
- [Blog](https://yusufincesu.netlify.app/blog.html): 20 bilingual articles on workflow platforms, .NET, databases, frontend and career.
- [Projects](https://yusufincesu.netlify.app/index.html#work): Selected public and internal software projects.

## Blog topics

- Workflow platforms, eBA / eBA Plus, Synergy CSP custom modules
- Clean C# APIs, Entity Framework Core
- PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Redis, MongoDB, SQLite
- TypeScript on the frontend, Tailwind vs SCSS
- React Native / Expo, REST integrations, Metabase dashboards, Docker
- Access control / security, Next.js SEO, career notes, learning in public

## Contact

- Email: yince8603@gmail.com
- Preferred: email or the contact form on the website.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Project descriptions intentionally omit client/company names for confidentiality.
- Public projects link to GitHub; internal/client projects are described only at a high level.
- The site is available in English (en) and Turkish (tr).
